title: Mod Presets
description: Add Mod Presets for modpacks with only one config! Easiest way to add optional mods in Minecraft
body:
### Make Modpacks pop!
Ever wanted to change some mods in a popular modpack but had to unlink instance to change them making you unable to update them?

**EVER WANTED TO MAKE OPTIONAL MOD PRESETS IN YOUR MODPACK??**

The solution found you!

- fully data driven 
- fully costomizable 
- easy to use
- made for any and all modpacks!

![showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2384ed2c6b709b391c2f5eb48c84b5ef0bba6167.gif)


for guide check out the mods [Wiki](https://github.com/multyfora/modpackpresets-1.21.1/wiki)



![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/790c65240150ae5a6cd821f2c67758806bb58f5a.png)
